question: Which one(s) of the following group(s) do you identify with? Please put only one or two crosses: - Danes - Turks - Romanians - Iraqis - Iranians - Palestinians - Bosnians - Russians - Afghans - Somalis - Muslims - Christians - Jews - Other group, write which _______ - Does not belong to any group

content.1: Danish and migrant or religious group
content.3: Other and migrant or religious group
